title: 2k Realistic Sand
description: This texture pack add realistic sand with PBR while still keeping good performance!
body:
Realistic Sand with PBR support

This pack maintains good prefomace with good visuels too

~85 fps on intel UHD graphics (UHD graphics 64EU)

Almost no drop in preformance!

Hope you enjoy my pack :)


-------------------------------------------------------

Textures are from ambient CG

-------------------------------------------------------
